name: ocean4dvarnet
summary: A computer program whose purpose is to apply deep learning schemes to dynamical systems and ocean remote sensing data.
author_email: Ronan Fablet <ronan.fablet@imt-atlantique.fr>, Quentin Febvre <quentin.febvre@ifremer.fr>, Pierre Haslee <author@example.com>, DanieL Zhu <daniel.zhu@imt-atlantique.fr>, Hugo Georgenthum <hugo.georgenthum@imt-atlantique.fr>, Braux Emmanuel <emmanuel.braux@imt-atlantique.fr>
